CONTENT.Honours: GenkBelgian First Division A: 2018–19Belgian Super Cup: 2019
CONTENT.Club career: Dewaest comes from youth academy of Lille. In January 2011 he signed a professional contract with Roeselare. In his debut season he came in five games. In his second season, he played 22 league games in which he scored a goal. During 2012–13 season he scored four goals in 31 matches. In April 2013 Charleroi signed Dewaest. He signed a two-year contract with an option in two additional years.
CONTENT.External links: Sébastien Dewaest at WorldFootball.netSébastien Dewaest at FootballDatabase.euSébastien Dewaest at the Royal Belgian Football Association

SUMMARY: Sébastien Dewaest (born 27 May 1991) is a Belgian professional footballer who plays as centre-back. He is currently unemployed after most recently playing for AEL Limassol. He has formerly played for Roeselare from 2011 until 2013 and for Charleroi from 2013 until 2015.
